name: Government & Infrastructure
coverImageAlt: White concrete public building rising against a clear sky
intro: Roads, public buildings and civil works delivered to the exacting standards of the Republic, tendered fairly, built precisely, and engineered for a century of service.

name: Real Estate Development
coverImageAlt: Waterfront towers at dusk seen across a calm marina
intro: Mixed-use destinations and commercial landmarks that anchor whole neighbourhoods, conceived, financed and delivered by a single accountable team.

name: Residential
coverImageAlt: Modern villa with a swimming pool glowing at dusk
intro: Homes measured in generations rather than square metres, villas, courtyards and seafront residences crafted for Mediterranean life.
